nodes.name: Day 1
nodes.description: POI: YYZ Airport Arrival - Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged.; POI: Harbourfront Stroll - Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.; Restaurant: Canoe Restaurant - Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

nodes.name: Day 2
nodes.description: POI: Client Kickoff Meeting - Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment.; POI: Strategy Workshop - Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.; Restaurant: Alo Restaurant - Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

nodes.name: Day 3
nodes.description: Restaurant: Hotel Continental Breakfast - Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.; POI: Stakeholder Presentation - Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.; POI: Art Gallery of Ontario - World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.; Restaurant: FRANK Restaurant at AGO - Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu.; Restaurant: Pai Northern Thai - Popular Thai restaurant known for authentic northern Thai cuisine. Lively atmosphere with bold flavors. Asian food option.

nodes.name: Day 4
nodes.description: Restaurant: Quick Grab Coffee - Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day.; POI: Full-Day Workshop - Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.; POI: Bloor Street Shopping - Optional shopping trip along Bloor-Yorkville luxury district. High-end boutiques and designer stores.; Restaurant: Lee Restaurant - Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine.

nodes.name: Day 5
nodes.description: Restaurant: Mildred's Temple Kitchen - Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.; POI: Client Check-in Call - Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room.; POI: Email Catch-up Block - Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.; POI: Networking Drinks - Casual drinks with industry contacts at a downtown bar. Work-adjacent networking opportunity.; Restaurant: Kaiseki Kaji - Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

nodes.name: Day 6
nodes.description: Restaurant: Sunset Grill - Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.; POI: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride - Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.; Restaurant: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch - Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.; POI: Ripley's Aquarium - World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.; Restaurant: The Keg Steakhouse - Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

nodes.name: Day 7
nodes.description: Restaurant: Fran's Restaurant - Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.; POI: Royal Ontario Museum - World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.; Restaurant: Eataly Toronto - Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.; POI: Distillery District Walk - Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.; Restaurant: Cluny Bistro - French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

nodes.name: Day 8
nodes.description: POI: Niagara Falls Day Trip - Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.; Restaurant: Elements on the Falls - Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.; Restaurant: Antler Kitchen - Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

nodes.name: Day 9
nodes.description: Restaurant: Lady Marmalade - Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.; POI: Eaton Centre Shopping - Major downtown shopping mall with hundreds of stores. Indoor shopping for souvenirs, clothing, and gifts. Climate-controlled and convenient.; Restaurant: Urban Eatery Food Court - Food court in Eaton Centre with diverse quick options. Fast and convenient but generic mall food.; POI: Queen Street West Boutiques - Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.; Restaurant: Bar Isabel - Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy.

nodes.name: Day 10
nodes.description: Restaurant: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast - Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.; POI: CN Tower EdgeWalk - Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.; Restaurant: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower - Revolving restaurant atop CN Tower with panoramic views. Special occasion dining with Canadian cuisine. Memorable farewell lunch.; POI: Airport Snack Stop - Generic airport food and coffee before boarding. Forgettable but necessary. Nothing special about airport dining.; POI: YYZ Departure - Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.
